rankings.reason: Best narrative flow; effectively integrates futuristic automation and personalized convenience, perfectly matching the requested 2050 vision.
Strong focus on AI-driven personalization and diverse traveler needs, though it lacks the vivid storytelling of Option C.
Creative visual elements like the aquarium are engaging, but the experience feels more like a mall than a futuristic airport.
Weakest entry; it is generic, repetitive, and incorrectly references Kyoto instead of the required Tokyo airport context.
